message:
Commit compiled MCP server dist files for end users

Remove dist/ from .gitignore so the compiled JavaScript is available
without requiring users to run npm install and build.

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,9 @@
+#!/usr/bin/env node
+/**
+ * Ultra-lightweight MCP Server for Chrome DevTools Protocol.
+ *
+ * Provides a single `use_browser` tool with multiple actions for browser control.
+ * Auto-starts Chrome when needed. Zero external dependencies beyond MCP SDK.
+ */
+export {};
+//# sourceMappingURL=index.d.ts.map
\ No newline at end of file
